purpose: Canonical operator-facing launch, hotkey, engine, wrapper, capability, and proof-level catalog.

launchPaths.behavior: Pin an explicit disposable dev save, prove the active save slot and loaded DLL hash, travel through Bannerlord, execute one real buy, leave the vanilla trade inventory visible, then prove MapTrade Manual cleanup.
launchPaths.warning: Certifying mode requires a clean committed exact head and no pre-existing Bannerlord process. Diagnostic/skip modes can never PASS.

launchPaths.behavior: Select Bannerlord's native Continue option and wait for campaign attach.
launchPaths.warning: This does not select or prove a named save. Confirm the loaded character in game before enabling Automation.

launchPaths.behavior: Start the configured new SandBox bootstrap path.
launchPaths.warning: Use only when a new/disposable campaign is intended.

hotkeys.feedback: Lower-left abort/hold notices and feature JSON

wrappers.stop: Runner returns only MapTrade to Manual and requires fresh authority evidence; Ctrl+Alt+B remains the in-game emergency abort
Runner always sends SetMapTradeManual and records cleanup

wrappers.contextBehavior: Automation intent foregrounds the live Bannerlord runtime, enters global Automation, resumes campaign time, watches one bounded loop, reacquires focus, and retries clock resume when status reports pause. A fresh ForgeStop sentinel is Quit intent and is honored unless the user cancels it during the five-second change-mind window.
wrappers.stop: Click ForgeStop.cmd. It defaults to soft stop after five seconds; press C to cancel or F for emergency force kill. Ctrl+Alt+B remains the in-game movement abort.

engines.automationCapability: Decision scheduling exists; worker adapters remain propose/defer for execution.
engines.handoff: Governor decision -> selected worker adapter -> evidence outcome
engines.runtimeProof: not certified as an end-to-end worker dispatcher

engines.automationCapability: Visible map travel and one bounded buy attempt; automatic tick start requires Automation.
engines.handoff: recursiveBranchState travel target -> MapTrade route -> route/trade evidence
engines.runtimeProof: fresh town-menu movement and trade proof still required for this branch

engines.automationCapability: One bounded asynchronous cycle; the context-aware operator wrapper promotes global mode to Automation, foregrounds Bannerlord, resumes time, and watches the cycle.
engines.handoff: operator context -> engine authority -> campaign clock -> market plan -> route/cohesion -> bounded trade/forge step -> loop report
engines.runtimeProof: context transitions, focus reacquisitions, pause corrections, ACK/status, crash state, and terminal loop report are written to the operator result

engines.automationCapability: Analyze and explicit movement surfaces exist.
engines.handoff: cohesion analysis -> explicit move -> cohesion evidence
engines.runtimeProof: global mode entry is not a complete service gate

engines.automationCapability: Read-only advice plus a pack-animal buy path through MapTrade.
engines.handoff: horse intel -> MapTrade pack mission -> item/gold delta evidence

engines.automationCapability: One bounded charcoal refine or eligible weapon smelt; crafting remains manual.
engines.handoff: forge advisory -> bounded refine/smelt -> smithing evidence
engines.runtimeProof: service is not yet gated by Smithing engine mode

engines.automationCapability: Intel and visible recruitment test surfaces only.
engines.handoff: tavern intel -> explicit recruitment test -> recruitment evidence
engines.runtimeProof: not wired into the autonomous guild loop

engines.automationCapability: Explicit assistive movement/action commands and the external assist runner.
engines.runtimeProof: external runner stop is separate from the in-game hotkey

requires: marketplace/trade screen visibly opened for the user
